# claude-skills, Codex distribution (spike)

This directory is a Codex-compatible build of the claude-skills catalog. It is
generated by `scripts/build-codex.mjs` from the repo's `skills/` source and is
safe to regenerate at any time (the build is idempotent and reversible).

## What this is

- `.agents/skills/<name>/SKILL.md` for all 102 skills, with frontmatter
  normalized to the portable core (`name` + `description` only).
- `.agents/skills/<name>/references/` carried over byte for byte, plus a
  `_claude-frontmatter-extras.yaml` sidecar holding the Claude-only metadata
  (`category`, `catalog_summary`, `display_order`) so the port stays reversible.
- `agents/openai.yaml`: a commented MCP wiring template listing every detected
  MCP server (Ahrefs MCP for the SEO audit suite, and others). An operator fills
  in the real server URLs / names / auth.

See `PORT_NOTES.md` for the full feasibility writeup, frontmatter rationale, and
caveats.

## How Codex finds skills

Codex discovers skills by scanning for an `.agents/skills/` directory, walking
from the current working directory up toward the repo root. Place the `.agents`
folder at (or above) the root of the project where you run Codex, and each
`SKILL.md` becomes available.

## Install

Copy the `.agents` tree into your target project:

```
cp -r dist/codex/.agents <target-project>/
```

Then, if you use any MCP-backed skills, copy `dist/codex/agents/openai.yaml`
into your Codex config location and fill in the placeholder server fields.

## Regenerate

From the repo root:

```
node scripts/build-codex.mjs
```

The script prints a transform log (skills copied, reference files copied,
frontmatter keys sidecar'd, MCP refs detected) followed by a validation pass with
PASS/FAIL per check.
